content: A collapsed pedestrian overpass has pancaked down onto multiple trains at a snowy station, with mangled metal, broken stairways and crushed carriages visible. Emergency personnel and bystanders are on site around the wreckage.

Aerial view of a house with most of its roof burned away and charred structural framing exposed, smoke still rising from the wreckage. Firefighting foam and hoses are visible around the property and a nearby vehicle, indicating recent emergency response.

A partially collapsed riverside building has had its central section washed away, leaving rubble and exposed interiors above a swollen, fast-moving river. Adjacent structures and the roadway are wet and threatened by floodwaters.

A pickup truck is partially submerged and driving through a flooded road or area with muddy brown water nearly reaching the vehicle's headlights. The scene suggests hazardous conditions from significant flooding and reduced traction/visibility for the driver.

Aerial view of a residential neighborhood inundated by floodwater, with streets submerged and vehicles partially submerged or surrounded by water. Several homes and RVs are surrounded by muddy water, indicating widespread flooding.

Aerial view of a dense residential neighborhood with many individual houses, yards, and tree-lined streets laid out in an irregular grid. Roads and intersections are visible between the properties, with varied roof colors and some small green spaces scattered throughout.

A small urban neighborhood seen from above, showing a grid of narrow streets and closely spaced rectangular buildings with a mix of light-colored roofs and bare ground patches. Some yards and open spaces between houses contain scattered debris or materials, giving parts of the area a slightly cluttered appearance.

A serious two-vehicle crash on a multilane road: a white SUV and a red compact car collided, with the red car heavily damaged and debris and fluid scattered across the lanes. Emergency personnel and a response vehicle are on scene directing traffic and assessing the wreckage.
